Trusted Stucco Contractors in Travis County

From downtown Austin remodels to lakeside custom homes in Lago Vista, Star Stucco of Austin delivers professional stucco repair, installation, and finishing across Travis County. Our crews understand the demands that Central Texas weather places on exterior surfaces and bring over 15 years of hands-on experience to every project.

Get a Free Stucco Estimate Call Now: (512) 706-9699

Stucco Built for Travis County Living

Travis County sits at the heart of Central Texas, where summer temperatures regularly push past 100 degrees and sudden spring storms can drop several inches of rain in a single afternoon. These swings between intense UV exposure and heavy moisture create real stress on exterior walls, making proper stucco application and maintenance essential for homeowners across the region.

Whether you own a mid-century ranch in Rollingwood, a modern build in Mueller, or a commercial property along the I-35 corridor, your stucco needs to stand up to the same punishing climate. We tailor our material selection, mixing ratios, and application techniques to match the soil conditions and weather patterns unique to the Austin metro area.

Our team has completed projects in every corner of Travis County, from the limestone bluffs overlooking Lake Travis to the expansive new developments east of Austin in Del Valle and Manor. That depth of local knowledge means fewer callbacks and longer-lasting results.

Stucco Services We Offer in Travis County

Professional stucco and plaster solutions for homes and businesses throughout Travis County.

Stucco Repair

Austin's intense heat and seasonal storms wear down stucco over time. We restore cracked, chipped, and deteriorating surfaces with repairs that blend seamlessly into your existing finish and hold up to Travis County's demanding climate.

Learn More

Stucco Installation

New construction and remodel projects across Travis County benefit from our full stucco installation services. We work with builders, architects, and homeowners to deliver smooth, textured, or custom finishes suited to modern Austin aesthetics.

Learn More

Stucco Crack Repair

The expansive clay soils common throughout Travis County cause foundation shifting that leads to stucco cracks. Our targeted crack repair process addresses both the visible damage and the underlying causes to prevent recurrence.

Learn More

Stucco Water Damage Repair

Heavy spring rains and flash flooding events in the Austin area can drive moisture behind stucco surfaces. We identify water intrusion points, dry and treat the substrate, and rebuild the damaged sections to prevent mold and structural problems.

Learn More

Exterior Plaster

Traditional and synthetic plaster finishes add character to Travis County homes, from historic neighborhoods south of the river to contemporary builds in West Lake Hills. We apply durable exterior plaster that resists fading and cracking under relentless Texas sun.

Learn More

EIFS Repair & Installation

Many commercial buildings and multi-family properties in Austin use EIFS for energy efficiency. Our certified team repairs delaminated panels, seals moisture entry points, and installs new EIFS systems that meet current building codes for Travis County.

Learn More

Commercial Stucco

Office parks, retail centers, and restaurants throughout Travis County rely on stucco for a professional exterior appearance. We handle large-scale commercial projects with minimal disruption to business operations, working around tenant schedules and city permit requirements.

Learn More

Why Travis County Homeowners Choose Star Stucco

Over 1,200 completed projects across Austin, Pflugerville, Lakeway, and surrounding Travis County communities

Fully licensed and insured with up-to-date City of Austin building permits for residential and commercial work

Detailed written estimates provided within 24 hours of your initial inspection request

Clean, respectful crews who protect your landscaping, driveways, and neighboring property during every project

Transparent pricing with no hidden fees — the number on your estimate is the number you pay

Local Expertise

We understand Travis County soil types, weather patterns, and building codes for every community.

Fully Licensed & Insured

Licensed Texas contractor with full liability and workers' compensation coverage for every Travis County project.

Fast Response

Prompt estimates and scheduling for all Travis County communities. Most projects begin within 1–2 weeks.

Common Stucco Problems We Fix in Travis County

Travis County homes face a unique combination of extreme heat, heavy rain, and shifting soils. Here are the stucco issues we see most often across the Austin area.

Cracks

The expansive clay soils found across much of Travis County swell after rain and shrink during dry spells, causing foundation movement that produces hairline to moderate stucco cracks. These are especially common in older Austin neighborhoods and areas near creek beds.

Bubbling or soft stucco

When moisture gets trapped behind the stucco surface — often due to improper flashing around windows or roof-wall intersections — the material softens and begins to bubble. In the humid months along the Travis County lake areas, this problem accelerates quickly.

Water stains

Runoff from gutters, splash-back from hardscaped patios, and wind-driven rain leave discolored streaks on stucco walls. Many Austin homes on sloped lots are especially vulnerable to staining along their lower wall sections.

Window and door leaks

Improperly sealed joints where stucco meets window and door frames are a top source of interior water damage in Travis County homes. Seasonal temperature swings cause caulk and sealant to crack, opening pathways for rain.

Failing patches

Previous spot repairs that were done with mismatched materials or without proper bonding agents tend to pop loose after a few Central Texas summers. We remove failed patches completely and redo them with the right mix and technique.

Separation around trim

Differences in how stucco, wood, and metal expand and contract in Austin's temperature extremes create gaps around fascia boards, corner trim, and decorative moldings. These gaps let water in and insects follow.

Impact damage

Hailstorms, fallen tree limbs, and even lawn equipment send debris into stucco walls. Travis County sees occasional severe weather events that leave pock-marked or gouged surfaces across entire neighborhoods.

Faded or stained exterior walls

Years of direct sun exposure, combined with dust and pollen common in the Austin area, leave stucco looking washed out or blotchy. A fresh finish restores curb appeal and adds a protective barrier against further UV degradation.

How We Work in Travis County

A clear, straightforward process from first call to finished project.

1

Schedule Your Inspection

Give us a call or fill out our online form. We will set up a convenient time to visit your Travis County property and evaluate your stucco in person.

2

Review the Scope of Work

Our technician walks the full exterior, documenting every area that needs attention. We explain what we find, show you photos, and discuss the best approach for your specific situation.

3

Get Your Estimate

Within 24 hours you receive a detailed, written estimate covering materials, labor, and timeline. No pressure, no expiration gimmicks — take the time you need to decide.

4

Complete the Work

Once approved, our crew arrives on the scheduled date with everything needed to finish the job. We work efficiently, keep the site clean, and do a final walkthrough with you before wrapping up.
